name_en: ❤️Dionysus Series GG Chain Wallet!!️《Gucci Guilty Forever》New Fashion Collection, GG Supreme canvas presents classic and timeless blue and beige combination, inheriting the historical origin of the material. The canvas material, which has a lower impact on the environment, has been used for a long time in multiple series and has become the brand's iconic material. This Dionysus chain wallet features classic colorways. Model: 476432. Size: 16.5*10*4.5cm. Color: Brown leather with canvas.
